---
title: "Model Health"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

data_dir = Path("../data/processed")

# Load data
try:
    backtest = pd.read_csv(data_dir / "backtest_results.csv")
    features = pd.read_parquet(data_dir / "features.parquet")
except:
    backtest = pd.DataFrame()
    features = pd.DataFrame()

```

## Backtest Results Across Seasons

```{python}
#| echo: false
if len(backtest) > 0:
    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
        x=backtest["test_season"],
        y=backtest["mape"],
        name="MAPE",
        marker_color='#E63946'
    ))
    fig.update_layout(
        title="Model Performance: MAPE by Test Season",
        xaxis_title="Test Season",
        yaxis_title="MAPE (lower is better)",
        height=400,
        hovermode='x unified'
    )
    fig.show()

    print("\n### Backtest Summary")
    print(backtest[["test_season", "test_size", "mape"]].to_string(index=False))
    print(f"\nAverage MAPE: {backtest['mape'].mean():.4f}")
else:
    print("No backtest data available. Run training to generate backtest results.")

```

## Residual Analysis

```{python}
#| echo: false
if len(features) > 0:
    # Calculate residuals (actual - predicted)
    # For this demo, use variance in attendance as proxy
    residuals = (features["attendance_pct"] - features["attendance_pct"].mean()).values

    fig = px.histogram(
        residuals,
        nbins=30,
        title="Residual Distribution (Proxy: Attendance Variance)",
        labels={"value": "Residual", "count": "Frequency"},
        color_discrete_sequence=['#457B9D']
    )
    fig.update_layout(height=400, showlegend=False)
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No residual data available")

```

## Data Freshness

```{python}
#| echo: false
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

data_files = [
    ("Forecasts", data_dir / "forecasts.parquet"),
    ("Features", data_dir / "features.parquet"),
    ("Model", data_dir / "model.pkl"),
]

print("### Data Freshness Check\n")
for name, path in data_files:
    if path.exists():
        mod_time = datetime.fromtimestamp(path.stat().st_mtime)
        hours_ago = (datetime.now() - mod_time).total_seconds() / 3600
        status = "🟢 Fresh" if hours_ago < 25 else "🟡 Stale"
        print(f"- **{name}:** {status} ({hours_ago:.1f} hours ago)")
    else:
        print(f"- **{name}:** 🔴 Missing")

```
